items.summary: In backend/main.mo, remove all authorization/identity checks from the setMaintenanceMode function. This function must accept calls from any caller (including anonymous) without throwing or returning any 'Unauthorized: Only admins can set maintenance mode' error. The PIN-protected frontend admin panel is the sole authentication gate — the backend must not enforce any caller identity restriction on setMaintenanceMode.

In backend/main.mo, remove all authorization/identity checks from the getAllUsers query function. This function must return all registered user records to any caller (including anonymous) without throwing or returning any 'Unauthorized' error. The PIN-protected frontend admin panel is the sole authentication gate — the backend must not enforce any caller identity restriction on getAllUsers.

In backend/main.mo, remove all authorization/identity checks from the blockUser and unblockUser functions. These functions must accept calls from any caller (including anonymous) without throwing or returning any 'Unauthorized: Only admins can block users' error. The PIN-protected frontend admin panel is the sole authentication gate — the backend must not enforce any caller identity restriction on these two functions.
